headline: Surging Earnings Estimates Signal Upside for State Street (STT) Stock
summary: State Street Corporation (STT) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.

headline: Best Momentum Stocks to Buy for July 20th
summary: STT, AEHR and NBIS made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) momentum stocks list on July 20, 2026.

headline: New Strong Buy Stocks for July 20th

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on State Street, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Glenn Schorr   maintains State Street (NYSE:STT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $186 to $200.
